allow: PowerShell($out = npm run types:check 2>&1 | Out-String; $out -split "`n" | Select-String -Pattern 'billing'; "---- billing errors above \(if any\) ----"; \($out -split "`n" | Select-String -Pattern 'error TS'\).Count)

PowerShell($env:DB_CONNECTION='sqlite'; $env:DB_DATABASE='D:\\CloudOne\\accounting\\storage\\verify_fresh.sqlite'; if \(-not \(Test-Path $env:DB_DATABASE\)\) { New-Item -ItemType File $env:DB_DATABASE | Out-Null }; php artisan migrate --force 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6; "==== EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE ===="; Remove-Item $env:DB_DATABASE -Force)

PowerShell($db = 'D:\\CloudOne\\accounting\\storage\\manual_check.sqlite'; if \(Test-Path $db\) { Remove-Item $db -Force }; New-Item -ItemType File $db | Out-Null; $env:DB_CONNECTION='sqlite'; $env:DB_DATABASE=$db; php artisan migrate --force 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; php artisan db:seed --class=ManualSectionSeeder --force 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4; "==== EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE ====")

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path 'd:\\CloudOne\\accounting\\public\\storage'\) { "storage symlink EXISTS"; \(Get-Item 'd:\\CloudOne\\accounting\\public\\storage'\).LinkType } else { "storage symlink MISSING - images will 404 until 'php artisan storage:link' is run" })

PowerShell($out = npm run types:check 2>&1 | Out-String; "---- errors in NEW manual files ----"; \($out -split "`n" | Select-String -Pattern 'manual'\); "---- total TS errors \(baseline was 41\) ----"; \($out -split "`n" | Select-String -Pattern 'error TS'\).Count)

PowerShell($out = npm run types:check 2>&1 | Out-String; "---- errors in manual files ----"; $m = \($out -split "`n" | Select-String -Pattern 'manual'\); if \($m\) { $m } else { "none" }; "---- total TS errors \(baseline 41\) ----"; \($out -split "`n" | Select-String -Pattern 'error TS'\).Count; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'built in')
